render:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="{{ page.language }}">
<head>
  <title>{{ content.title }} - {{ page.name }}</title>
<style type="text/css">
  * { margin: 0; padding: 0; border-box: box-sizing; }
  body { font-family: Arial, san-serif; }
  header { background-color: white; }
  footer { background-color: #ccc; color: red; }
  img { max-width: 350px; }
</style>
</head>
<body>
  <header>
    {{ page.name }}
  </header>
  <main>
    {{ main }}
    img[https://dbproject.rf.gd/assets/img/miniatura.png]img;
  </main>
  <footer>
    © {{ page.year }} {{ page.name }}.
  </footer>
<body>
</html>
